title: Dogfood Pass 0001 Receipts and Proof Seeds

claims.text: Index status, Gather doctor, Crucible doctor, and Telos operator doctor all returned MATCH during pass 0001.
claims.falsification: any named tool returned DRIFT, UNVERIFIABLE, or error in recorded pass output

claims.text: The corrected Gather web intake kept 3 of 4 sources and produced digest seal 429a5b75ba27f5bef8d4e113291d01d2e6b6bc7b12f57e7aeb91d87ab36272cb.
claims.falsification: recorded gather_run output has kept not equal to 3, gathered not equal to 4, or a different digest seal

claims.text: The periodic heat-equation finite-difference probe produced monotonically non-increasing discrete energy for 200 steps.
claims.falsification: recorded heat-equation probe has energy increases greater than 0

claims.text: Pass 0001 promotes zero natural-law discoveries; all law-like outputs remain hypotheses, identities, probes, or internal invariants.
claims.falsification: any pass 0001 packet labels a new natural law as verified or promoted
